title: Rollback Verification Checklist
description: Schema readiness for rollback verification checklists, covering verification steps, success criteria, health check validation, and sign-off tracking.

fields.name: verification_step_schema
fields.purpose: Schema defining verification steps performed after rollback

fields.name: success_criteria_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for measurable success criteria for rollback verification

fields.name: health_check_validation_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for health check validation after rollback execution

fields.name: sign_off_tracking_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for tracking sign-offs on rollback verification

fields.name: verification_evidence_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for capturing evidence artifacts from verification steps

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real rollback verification execution, no health check validation, no evidence collection. Verification remains non-functional.
